name: cctv-business-seo
description: Smart tiered SEO for CCTV, security, data cabling, TV aerial business
instructions:
For your CCTV/security business in Newcastle/NE: Use SMART tiered SEO strategy.

TIER 1 (Manual/Semi-Manual - High Value):
- Medium (@cctvwebsites), LinkedIn articles
- PR posts: PRLog, OpenPR, IssueWire, PRFree
- 2-3 strong Web 2.0s (Blogger, WordPress)
- Guest posts when possible

TIER 2 (Hidden Gems - Automation Friendly):
- Postach.io (Evernote sync), Penzu
- Site123, Strikingly.com, Webnode.com, Yola.com, Doodlekit.com
- Ampblogs.com, Blog2Learn.com, Ka-blogs.com
- SlideShare, Issuu, Scribd (PDF/docs with embedded links)
- Academia.edu, Pressbooks.com
- Mix.com (bookmarking + fast indexing)
- Instructables, HubPages, Hometalk (niche authority)
- TravelBlog.org, Couchsurfing (if relevant)

TIER 3 (Indexing + Diversification):
- Social bookmarks, profile links, niche directories

REAL SEO (2026):
- Topical clusters on YOUR main site (Wix)
- Parasite pages (Google Sites) that rank themselves
- E-E-A-T signals, schema markup
- Build 5-10 Web 2.0s like REAL blogs (5-10 articles each + internal linking)
- Quality over quantity - avoid automation footprint

Platforms: Main Wix, Blogger, Medium, Substack, Google Sites, GitHub Pages, Netlify, Bluesky, MeWe, GoDaddy, Canva, Base44. Target local: Newcastle, NE1-NE12, Sunderland, Durham.
